# Marketo

Adobe Marketo Engage — enterprise marketing-automation platform (lead nurture, email campaigns, scoring). Surfaced in the [[marketing-prime-radiant]] scope as one of several potential marketing-automation surfaces Janus may eventually integrate signals from.

## Status

No active evaluation; no commitment. Flagged as a candidate signal source if and when Janus's marketing stack expands beyond CRM + manual operations. The CRM selection ([[crm-evaluation-and-selection]]) is the rate-limiting prerequisite — marketing-automation choices follow CRM, not lead it.
